author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 55a7b96: run() -> Result<(), i32>, result_to_code adapter removed, three process::exit(1) sites in stdin-read closures replaced with read_stdin_bytes()/read_stdin_string() helpers returning Err(1). Sole process::exit now in main() after run() returns, so all RAII destructors run. Verified: cargo test --workspace all green, clippy -D warnings clean, fmt clean. Stale comment in json_mode.rs:353 (claims run_json_mode calls process::exit) noted for cleanup under #84.
